name: academorix/horizon
purpose: Laravel Horizon queue monitoring with attribute-driven supervisor and metric discovery — tag a class with #[AsMetric] or #[HorizonTag] and it registers automatically.
capabilities: #[AsMetric] class attribute for automatic Horizon metric registration
#[HorizonTag] class attribute for automatic job tagging
Priority + enabled controls per metric / tag
when_to_use: Adding a custom Horizon metric or a tagging strategy for queued jobs.
when_not_to_use: For scheduling recurring jobs, reach for academorix/scheduling; for error tracking use academorix/sentry.
